title: Error Taxonomy, Wrapping, Retry Decisions, User Recovery, and Exit · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Error Taxonomy
summary: Every failure becomes unable to fetch, handlers log and return nil, retries include invalid input, wrapped causes are discarded, and one command failure terminates the session. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go error taxonomy increment in causal recoverable Pokedex error contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Classify input, not found, protocol, timeout, cancellation, transport, decode, invariant, persistence, and internal errors by caller decision.
Test empty, duplicate, multi-version, malformed relation, large, filtered, cached, and changed-area fixtures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
